text:
Dylan Brady is THAT guy, the brainiac behind hyperpop's chaotic magic and co-founder of 100 gecs. He’s like the mad scientist of glitchy, genre-defying sounds, pushing boundaries with every track. Whether you’re here for the deep cuts or the hype hits, Dylan’s music feels like stepping into a candy-coated fever dream where nothing is predictable but everything is vibey. Let’s get into the tracks that define his wizardry.

Supersonic (my existence) is pure sonic overload. It’s giving existential crisis on a rocket ship, with Dylan teaming up with Skrillex and Noisia to craft a track that’s both cerebral and banging. The lyric “My existence, you can’t resist us” hits hard, like a lowkey anthem for self-actualization. The drop? It’s a whole rave packed into three minutes. Listen here 
🪐🔥: https://open.spotify.com/track/3qL63QvSTHvC4Uw8eEhz4z

Money Machine is peak hyperpop chaos. Dylan’s collab with Laura Les gives us sarcastic, in-your-face energy with lyrics that read like a meme manifesto. “Your arms look so f***ing cute, they look like lil’ cigarettes” is ICONIC, okay? The distorted beats and mockery-laden delivery make this track a hyperpop essential. Feel so clean like a money machine? Listen here 
💸✨: https://open.spotify.com/track/61bwFjzXGG1x2aZsANdLyl

Stupid Horse might be the funniest heartbreak anthem ever. Betting money on a horse and losing it all spirals into a hilarious punkish hyperpop meltdown. The beat is manic, the humor is sharp, and the energy is unstoppable. Bet on this banger here 
🐎🔥: https://open.spotify.com/track/23Dapn8107GgxvXDIsPwWm

Ringtone takes the mundane concept of a personalized ringtone and flips it into a bittersweet love song. The contrast between Laura’s upbeat chorus and Dylan’s introspective verses creates this back-and-forth of emotional chaos. The track feels both lighthearted and devastating. Customize your vibes here 
📱💕: https://open.spotify.com/track/3VHiIVQe8Sc6gtSsTp3pDz

800db Cloud is the soundtrack to pure rebellion. Dylan’s distorted vocals mixed with lyrics about weed, Monster energy, and chaotic vibes make it the ultimate stoner anthem for hyperpop fans. It's loud, it's messy, and it's addictive. Hit play here 
☁️🔥: https://open.spotify.com/track/2MLuFz9Y3Vg3PF0Yf93M5c

Black Rum delivers dark, eerie vibes while keeping Dylan’s signature chaotic energy intact. Featuring haunting vocals from Ravenna Golden, the track feels like wandering through a dreamscape laced with candy and regret. Perfect for late-night feels. Drink it up here 
🖤🍹: https://open.spotify.com/track/5sX8XyI1pdReiCbSpOjCaf

Dylan Brady isn’t just making music; he’s creating an entire multiverse of sound. Whether he’s solo or collaborating, every track is an unpredictable ride packed with emotion, humor, and vibes. For fans who thrive on chaos and crave the unexpected, Dylan Brady is the blueprint. 🚀✨
